title: vincetoxicum glaucirameum
intro: Vincetoxicum glaucirameum, also known as Chinese milkvetch or Perennial milkwort, is a perennial plant in the family Asclepiadaceae, native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. In herbal preparations, Vincetoxicum glaucirameum is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in the production of extracts and capsules for modern supplements.
